description: The BMW Z4, produced across three generations since 2002, is BMW's two-seat roadster. The E85/E86 generation offered a folding hardtop coupe variant and the Z4 M with a 343 bhp straight-six. The current G29, co-developed with the Toyota Supra, offers up to 382 bhp in M40i form.
